titleStmt.title: SII 22.361: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 361. (A.R. No. 361 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. JAṬ. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—15th YEAR.

summary.p: The king gets the same attributes as in No. 360 above. The inscription is damaged. It records an agreement given by the nāṭṭār and the sthānattār of the temple of Tirunalakkuṉṟamuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār, to a certain individual (name lost) of Viśalūr, who had donated three mā of land to the temple, to the effect that they would supply 2 kalam of rice and other requirements of the Tiruppāvāḍaiamudu to the god on each of the four special festival days in the year, when the deity was taken in procession to the temple garden. Incidental mention is made of the conversion of a dēvadāna land at Viśalūr into a tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple by the Nāṭṭār and Ūrār, on which occasion this gift is said to have been made by the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ Īḻamuṅ koṅkuñ coḻamaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭu vallāṉai veṉṟu perumpaṟṟappuliyūril virar[ Abhiṣe kamu] m vicaiyar [ Abhiṣeka] mum paṇṇi
yaru[ḷiṉa śrī vira]pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu koṉāṭāṉa kaṭa laṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Uṭaiyār tirunalak kuṉṟamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟtāṉatto
mum vica piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam vicalūr vayalil tevatāṉamāṉa nilattile tāmum Ūrārumāka
tirunāmattukkāṇiyākap paṇṇittarukaiyil Ivar tammuṭaiya taṉma māka Innilam nālukkut tiruveḻuccikku Ivvuṭaiyāṟkut tiruccāntu cātti Eḻuntaruḷit tirumaṇṭapattu Ēṟiyaruḷi—
ṉāl Irukala Ariciyum Itukku veṇṭum kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷuṅ kuṟaivaṟuttu tirunāḷtoṟum tiruppāvāṭai Amutu ceyvippatāka viṭṭa nilam 3� Innilam muṉṟu māvum tāmaraiccey centivayakkalā
ṉa vayakkaluḷḷiṭṭa taṭiyile kaittaṭippaṭi muṉṟu māvuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunāḷ moṉṟukku Irukalamum kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷum kuṟaivaṟuttut tiruppāvāṭai
ttirunāḷ nā(l)lum Eḻuntaruḷi Ittirunāḷukkut tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Irukalamāka vanta Arici koyilile Aḷantu tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakkar kaiyil taravukoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittup piṭipāṭu paṇ
ṇikkuṭuttom ṉaṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟtāṉattomum Ippaṭik
var tiruttoppil tevarkaḷ Eḻuntaruḷumpotu tiruvitippakkattu nāṭṭiṉ kaṟka
Innilaṅkaḷukku nila viḻukkāṭukaḷile nir peṟa
paṭi cammati ṇṇik kuṭuttom vaḷaṉāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Ikkoyiṟ tāṉattomum I
ppaṭikku nampuceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkup puṉṉaṅkuṭic cempiya taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aṇṇalvāyiṟ kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cikaranallūr vaḷavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ceṅkatiṟ
coḻamuventaveḷān Eḻuttu Ivai virarājentiracoḻamuventa veḷān Eḻuttu Ivai Ālāla cuntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṟi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kkuntiyāra paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai caivācāriyam tirucciṟṟampala paṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nālāyira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aka ṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirumuṉaippāṭi nampi Eḻuttu Ivai tirunalakkuṉṟa mārāyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai kulottuṅkap pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vañcat taraiyaṉ Ivai koyiṟkaṇakkut tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
koyiṟkaṇakkuc cerntavaṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.361 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
